name: CURV_f
description: Curve lookup table - outputs values from a pre-defined curve using interpolation

exprs.description: No exprs - values configured via realParameters

realParameters.description: Curve data points - x1,y1,x2,y2,... format with bounds

xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="CURV_f" blockType="c" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="1" simulationFunctionName="intplt" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="CURV_f">
  <ScilabDouble as="exprs" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="1" width="10">
    <data line="0" column="0" realPart="0.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="1" realPart="1.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="2" realPart="2.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="3" realPart="-5.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="4" realPart="5.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="5" realPart="0.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="6" realPart="0.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="7" realPart="-5.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="8" realPart="2.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="9" realPart="5.0"/>
  </ScilabDouble>
  <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="5" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="3"/>
    <data line="0" column="1" value="2"/>
    <data line="0" column="2" value="10"/>
    <data line="0" column="3" value="2"/>
    <data line="0" column="4" value="10"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Empty exprs (height=0, width=0) - configured via real/integerParameters
Depends on time not input (no input ports)
criticalRules: No input ports - operates as timed signal source
realParameters contain curve points in x1,y1,x2,y2,... order
Outputs curve value based on current simulation time
Used for predefined reference signals/arbitrary waveforms
